utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget (actually 7 items). Count carefully: 1) destination, 2) travel_dates, 3) transportation, 4) accommodation, 5) activities, 6) additional_services, 7) total_budget = 7 total. Now check final package: destination provided; travel_dates provided (specific dates); transportation includes flight details with costs (type, details, cost) — yes; accommodation includes hotel name, nights, cost — yes; activities listed with names and costs — yes; additional_services: lists meals with an estimate but lacks cost clarity? It says 'Estimated €150' which is a cost, so acceptable; total_budget: provided as '€920' — but does it include a complete cost breakdown? The field says 'complete cost breakdown' — the package only provides a single total number without itemized breakdown summing components. However, individual components have costs above; total_budget field itself is not a breakdown, just a total. The requirement for that item is a complete cost breakdown, which is not fully satisfied within that field. So this item is not fully specified. All other six items are fully specified.
